description_long: This is a two-story brick house with a flat roof and a modern, rectangular design. The front facade features a prominent entry door, large rectangular windows with black frames, and a paved walkway leading up to the entrance. The exterior walls are clad in reddish-brown brick, while the window and door frames are accented in black, giving the house a contemporary urban appearance. The roof is flat and bordered by a low parapet, with several vertical black pipes or decorative elements visible on the front. The interior is partially visible, showing divided rooms and a mix of flooring textures. The overall structure is compact and boxy, suitable for dense urban neighborhoods.
description: A modern, two-story brick house with a flat roof, large black-framed windows, and a paved front walkway. The design is compact and urban, with clean lines and minimal ornamentation.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry door, two large windows, black decorative elements, and the paved walkway.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the plain brick wall with no windows or doors, and the extension of the paved walkway.
description_view_2: Rear view with a secondary door, two windows, and visible black pipes or decorative features on the left side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing a plain brick wall and the continuation of the walkway, with interior room divisions visible.
attribute_entryway_design: Single main door with rectangular transom, paved walkway, and minimal decorative elements
